subcodes.first_line: Certain among the Prophets had their chosen poets, even as Hassan was the poet of the Apostle of God, and Varqá is Our poet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعضی از پیغمبرها شاعر مخصوص داشتند چنانکه شاعر رسول الله حسان بود شاعر ما هم ورقاست
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
